title: molecular_glue_v1 — MOLECULAR-GLUE sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/molecular_glue_sim.py. One row per monovalent molecular glue: the cooperative ternary-complex equilibrium nucleating a target<->E3 neo-interface, the two binary references, the thermodynamic-cycle detailed-balance check, and the 'neither binary affinity alone sufficient' glue signature. MOLECULAR-GLUE is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

molecular_glue.description: Molecular glue identifier within the deterministic panel.

drug_precedent.description: Own modality precedent (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

valency.description: Valency descriptor; a molecular glue is monovalent (no bivalent linker).

k_glue_nM.description: Dissociation constant of the monovalent glue to the partner it binds with appreciable affinity (nM).

k_ppi_nM.description: Dissociation constant of the bare target<->E3 protein-protein interface with no glue (nM, typically large).

alpha.description: Cooperativity factor (> 1 for a glue) amplifying the effective affinity of the second binding event.

conc_target_nM.description: Assay concentration of the target/neosubstrate protein (nM).

conc_e3_nM.description: Assay concentration of the E3 ligase (nM).

conc_glue_nM.description: Assay concentration of the molecular glue (nM).

f_binary_target.description: Mass-action binary occupancy of the glue->target engagement (no cooperativity).

f_binary_ppi.description: Mass-action binary occupancy of the bare target<->E3 protein-protein interface (no glue).

f_ternary_path_glue_first.description: Cooperative ternary occupancy via the glue-binds-target-first assembly path.

f_ternary_path_ppi_first.description: Cooperative ternary occupancy via the bare-PPI-first assembly path.

thermo_cycle_rel_err.description: Relative difference between the two assembly-path ternary occupancies; detailed-balance / thermodynamic-cycle consistency gate.

binary_target_insufficient.description: True iff the glue->target binary occupancy is below the insufficiency ceiling.

binary_ppi_insufficient.description: True iff the bare target<->E3 binary occupancy is below the insufficiency ceiling.

ternary_sufficient.description: True iff the cooperative ternary occupancy exceeds the sufficiency floor.

neither_binary_sufficient.description: True iff BOTH binary occupancies are low — the defining glue condition.

glue_signature.description: True iff neither binary is sufficient yet the cooperative ternary is high — the molecular-glue signature.

ternary_over_best_binary.description: Cooperative ternary fraction divided by the larger of the two binary occupancies.
